personal.name: Saadi Safdar
personal.tagline: Building intelligent software, full-stack web apps, and AI-powered solutions through clean, practical code.
personal.description: Born in 2006, raised in Wah, Pakistan. A developer and problem-solver spanning the full development spectrum — backend systems, complex databases, responsive frontend interfaces, and computer vision algorithms. Interested in the intersection of AI and practical software.
personal.education: B.S. Computer Science, University of Wah (2024 — Present)

projects.title: IntelliCrime System
projects.description: Full-stack criminal investigation and record management system with Oracle Database integration, Flask backend, secure authentication, evidence tracking, FIR management, and reporting.

projects.title: LancerLink
projects.description: Freelance marketplace platform connecting clients and freelancers with project bidding, user profiles, messaging, milestone management, and responsive UI.

projects.title: Universal Conversion Engine
projects.description: Modern desktop conversion utility supporting multiple measurement categories through an intuitive interface and efficient conversion logic.

projects.title: HeadGear Sentinel
projects.description: Real-time helmet detection system using computer vision and deep learning — automatically identifies workers not wearing safety helmets for industrial safety compliance.

projects.title: SpaceCom Defender
projects.description: Interactive space combat game with wave-based enemy spawning, collision detection, real-time score tracking, and progressive difficulty.

projects.title: Intelligent Route Engine
projects.description: Graph-based route optimization engine implementing Dijkstra and A* algorithms to find shortest paths across complex networks — written in C++ for performance.
